styleGuide: Modern technology editorial illustration, cinematic lighting, premium detail, realistic 3D depth, clean composition, blue and teal palette with subtle warm accents, no text, no logos, no watermarks, no people facing camera, no UI screenshots.
negativePrompt: blurry, low resolution, noisy image, distorted anatomy, text overlays, watermarks, logos, branded trademarks, political symbols, extra limbs, messy composition, oversaturated colors, duplicate objects

projects.title: SS&E Data Integration Pipeline
projects.prompt: A dynamic data integration scene connecting university systems: structured data streams flowing from campus ERP to SQL warehouse, Python transformation layer, and analytics dashboards for Canvas and Watermark outcomes, futuristic command center aesthetic, high clarity

projects.title: Canvas Enrollment & Term Sync Engine
projects.prompt: A systems synchronization visualization showing enrollment and term data aligning between two enterprise platforms through secure API bridges, clean timeline indicators, conflict resolution cues, reliable operations theme

projects.title: AI Content Automation System (n8n)
projects.prompt: An AI automation pipeline with connected workflow nodes generating, reviewing, and publishing social content across channels, intelligent orchestration, content blocks transforming through each stage, polished enterprise visual language

projects.title: Shopify to Meta Ads Optimization Engine
projects.prompt: A high-performance e-commerce growth engine scene with product feed streams, ad optimization loops, attribution events, and creative variants scaling across campaign channels, energetic but clean business style

projects.title: MongoDB Product Normalization Layer
projects.prompt: A centralized product data model represented as a normalized data graph over MongoDB collections, multiple storefront channels fed from one trusted source, consistency and governance visualized with crisp structure

projects.title: Telegram Approval Workflow System
projects.prompt: A human-in-the-loop approval workflow visual where AI-generated media cards move through review states in a chat-driven command interface, clear approve and revise states, responsive interaction design mood

projects.title: SQL-Based Student Financial Aggregation
projects.prompt: A precise financial data aggregation environment with SQL tables joining balances and transactions into student-level summaries, reconciliation indicators, audit-ready accuracy, enterprise education analytics context

projects.title: Multi-Platform AI Media Pipeline
projects.prompt: A multi-platform AI media production pipeline combining image generation, voice synthesis, and video assembly into short-form content at scale, modular stages, motion energy, studio-grade finish
